data.body:
Scope expansion (2026-04-27, from epic 1083-fb3d SC9 integration):

This story's scope expands to cover sprint orchestrator's PR-per-batch loop, not just merge-to-main.sh.

New behavior: sprint creates a PR after each batch (not per epic), waits for CI green via 'gh pr checks' before starting the next batch, and merges via 'gh pr merge' once CI passes. Epic completion is the final batch's PR merge.

Implementation impact:
- merge-to-main.sh (or its replacement) is invoked per batch by sprint, not once at epic close
- Sprint orchestrator phase that previously did cumulative push-at-epic-close becomes a per-batch wait-on-PR-merge loop
- CI (including validate.sh --ci as a required check once 3aaa-0238's scope expansion lands) is the inter-batch gate
- No new local-only test gate between batches — CI is single source of truth

Reference: epic 1083-fb3d SC9, approach paragraph 2.
